summary: Frontend-only testing of DATAWEB static landing page. All required data-testid elements present, navigation/CTA scroll behaviors work, contact section has correct dark green bg (#0F3D2E), mailto/tel links and copy-to-clipboard work, mobile viewport (375px) hides desktop CTA and shows Contact link. No console errors.
critical_code_review_comments: Contact.jsx: silent catch on clipboard write — consider a user-visible fallback toast for unsupported/insecure contexts (low priority).
Nav.jsx: anchor href='#top' is on Hero section; this works, but consider also handling DATAWEB brand link to smooth-scroll to top with focus mgmt for a11y.

Smooth scroll relies on CSS scroll-behavior; sticky nav (~5rem) means anchored sections may have heading hidden behind nav — consider scroll-margin-top utility on section anchors for cleaner anchoring.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pure static landing page (no backend). Verified at REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Use data-testids listed in problem statement. Marquee may keep network from going fully idle — use domcontentloaded + wait for hero-heading instead of networkidle.
